T0057.title: Loan Sharking
T0057.definition: In underground lending contexts, "water money" refers to usurious loans, specifically short-term, high-interest loans closely tied to gambling activities.
T0057.description: In underground lending contexts, "water money" refers to usurious loans, specifically short-term, high-interest loans closely tied to gambling activities.
T0057.usageExample: 他昨晚在赌场输光了，找场子里的档头拿了十万块水钱，说好借十还十三，结果一周没还上，被追债的堵了门。
